description: Sector overlay for South African sports organisations, clubs, federations, academies, athletes, events, anti-doping, safeguarding, and sports-governance documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Sports. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Sport and Recreation Act, 1998
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Sport, Arts and Culture

primary_sources.name: South African Institute for Drug-Free Sport framework
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

primary_sources.name: Safety at Sports and Recreational Events Act framework
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / SAPS / event authorities

rules.title: Federation, club, or sport-organisation governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for federation affiliation, club registration, constitution, governance, or recognition evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Anti-doping policy or testing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for anti-doping, SAIDS, WADA, testing, prohibited substances, TUE, or athlete education evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Safeguarding and athlete welfare evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safeguarding, child protection, athlete welfare, abuse reporting, or medical fitness controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Sport event safety or permit evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for event permit, safety plan, venue certificate, crowd management, security, or emergency plan evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Athlete, minor, or medical-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for POPIA, privacy notice, consent, athlete data, minor data, or medical data controls.
